mnemonics.title: BRE vs ERE Escaping
mnemonics.content: BRE Needs Extra Backslashes For Special Characters: +, ?, |, (, ), {, } all need \ in BRE but not in ERE.

mnemonics.title: Anchor Positions
mnemonics.content: UpArrow (^) points to Start, Dollar ($) money comes at the End.

mnemonics.title: Quantifiers
mnemonics.content: Star (*) = Zero or More, Plus (+) = One or More, Question (?) = Zero or One
